Description: Verify adding new admin system user
Pre-condition: User is logged in Admin module
Test Steps:
1. Click Add button
2. Select User Role
3. Enter existing employee name
4. Enter unique username, password
5. Click Save button
Expected Result: System user is created and visible in search list

Description: Verify searching system user by username
Pre-condition: User is logged in Admin module
Expected Result: User record matching username is displayed in results

Pre-condition: User is logged in Admin module
Test Steps:
1. Search user
2. Click Edit
3. Change role
4. Click Save
Expected Result: Updated role is successfully saved and persists

Description: Verify user role displays correctly in search results
Pre-condition: User is logged in Admin module
Test Steps:
1. Search user by username
2. Check role column in results
Expected Result: Role column displays the correct updated role

Description: Verify Admin page has Add button visible
Pre-condition: User is logged in Admin module
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to Admin module
2. Check Add button visibility
Expected Result: Add button is visible on Admin page

Pre-condition: User is logged in Admin module
Test Steps:
1. Search user
2. Click Delete button
3. Confirm deletion
Expected Result: User is removed from database and search returns no results
